customEffect.hlslSource: cbuffer Constants : register(b0){    float Switch;};Texture2D A : register(t0);Texture2D B : register(t1);SamplerState Sampler0 : register(s0);// D2D provides TEXCOORD in pixel/scene space.// Normalize with GetDimensions() before sampling.// D2D's sampler uses CLAMP addressing (edge color for out-of-bounds).float4 main(    float4 pos : SV_POSITION,    float4 uv0 : TEXCOORD0,    float4 uv1 : TEXCOORD1) : SV_TARGET{    float Aw, Ah;    A.GetDimensions(Aw, Ah);    float4 color0 = A.SampleLevel(Sampler0, uv0.xy / float2(Aw, Ah), 0);    float Bw, Bh;    B.GetDimensions(Bw, Bh);    float4 color1 = B.SampleLevel(Sampler0, uv1.xy / float2(Bw, Bh), 0);    float4 output = (color0 * (1 - Switch)) + (color1 * Switch);    return output;}
